title: Google Drive API Client Setup - Implementation Tasks
response:
Feedback Summary (1 comments):

General Comments:
1. Class-based DTO should only in backend.
Types in `packages/types/src/dtos` should be type/interface based DTO for frontend and backend sharing the same DTO type.
